title: D-Walker VS Sahelanthropus
description: Inspired by the D-Walker vs. Sahelanthropus fight scenes from Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain.

blocks.text:
Ten years ago(2015), I experienced one of the most unforgettable moments in gaming: the battle against Sahelanthropus in Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain. That rush and momentum stayed with me ever since. Over the years, I kept asking myself, "What took you so long?" The answer is simple: I wanted to return to this moment with the skills, experience, and knowledge I gained through a decade of work as a technical artist in the game industry.

Now, on the 10th anniversary of MGSV, I am bringing that memory back to life through my own recreation, a tribute to a true video game legend.

I hope you enjoy it.
